Prompt: Write a short, engaging overview about . Keep it fact-based, but feel free to use a relaxed and conversational tone. Focus on the most interesting and important points first. Include information about . Ignore . Surround all names of people with and all location names with . No need for headers and titles. When you refer to the place, no need to mention the state and country.
PromptSuffix: If relevant, highlight what makes <place> different from <previous_place>. Avoid repeating details already mentioned: <previous_answer>.
SharingPromptTemplate: Create a brief, engaging description (2-3 sentences) of this road trip route. Focus on the journey and highlight interesting places visited. Keep it conversational and travel-focused. Route details: {ROUTE_DETAILS} Example style: "What an amazing journey through [region]! Started at [first place] and made memorable stops at [key highlights], covering [distance/time period]. This route showcases some beautiful [type of locations] worth exploring!"
